name: Zak Nesler
title: Full-Stack Engineer
qualities: A keen eye for detail and design
Keeps up with the latest web technologies and best practices
Thrives on hard problems and enjoys iterating toward clean solutions
Enjoys writing self-documenting, tested, and tidy code

description_list: Covering the entire development process from designing in Figma to implementation and testing with a small, agile, and focused team
Designing and developing customer-facing insurance dashboard with Next.js, back-office React operations dashboard, and interacting with Express.js microservices that interface with 3rd party APIs
Collaborating with marketing and business teams to design and implement new features to increase user engagement and improve UX
Maintaining and improving existing codebase, including refactoring legacy code and modernizing legacy JavaScript projects to TypeScript
Implemented communication logging feature covering the entire stack with great feedback from end users
Improved UI/UX, loading times, and optimized SQL stored procedures
Utilized Express.js, Angular, and SQL Server
Designed and implemented an admin interface to manage warehouse employees & permissions
Managed a team of 3 developers to design and implement features for an existing web application
Utilized .NET Core, React, and SQL Server

education.description: Graduated cum laude with a B.Sc. degree in Computer Science. One of two recipients of the Outstanding Senior Award in Computer Science.
courses: Python, Java, C, C++, Go, Racket, PHP, HTML/CSS/JS, Unix
